description_long: This is a tall, modern refrigerator with a sleek, rectangular form and a two-door design. The exterior is predominantly dark, likely black or dark gray, with a smooth, glossy finish. The interior features multiple transparent shelves and drawers, providing organized storage for food items. The doors are equipped with long, vertical, protruding handles for easy opening, and the right door is shown open, revealing the spacious compartments inside. There is no visible brand logo or control panel on the exterior, and the design is minimalistic with clean lines. The refrigerator appears robust and is suitable for placement in urban environments such as garages, kitchens, or communal spaces.
description: A tall, modern, two-door refrigerator with a dark, glossy exterior and multiple transparent interior shelves and drawers. Features long, vertical handles and a minimalistic design.
description_view_0: Front view with the right door open, showing multiple transparent shelves and drawers inside.
description_view_1: Rear or side view with both doors closed, highlighting the smooth, dark exterior and minimalistic design.
description_view_2: Side view showing the depth and solid, unadorned surface of the refrigerator.
description_view_3: Angled view with the left door open, revealing additional interior compartments and storage drawers.
attribute_door_handle_style: Long, vertical, protruding handles mounted on the edge of each door.
